title: Consultation on the List of Atypical Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients for Veterinary Use - Canada.ca
content:
## Consultation on the List of Atypical Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients for Veterinary Use - Closed consultation

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from July 25, 2018 to September 24, 2018.
Health Canada invited participants to provide comments on the list of  Atypical Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients (APIs) for veterinary use. Health  Canada considers certain APIs that are of lower risk and widely used outside of  the pharmaceutical industry as atypical APIs. This was consistent with the  approach that was taken for the implementation of the establishment licensing  requirements for APIs for human use.
These APIs, considered as atypical APIs, and on the List of Atypical  APIs for veterinary use, are currently used as pharmaceutical excipients, or as  ingredients in natural health products (NHPs), Veterinary Health products  (VHPs), as well as foods, and meet recognized standards other than Good  Manufacturing Practices (GMP).

## Who was the focus of this consultation
- animal health industry
- veterinary health professionals
- all other interested parties

## Goals of the consultation
The goal of the consultation was to get feedback on the List  of Atypical APIs for veterinary use.
Importers of these APIs and finished dosage form importers  of products formulated using these APIs may experience challenges in obtaining  GMP evidence due to the nature and the design of the manufacturing processes  and the international classification for these ingredients.
This List is expected to offer importers of these atypical  APIs and finished dosage form importers of products formulated using these  atypical APIs, more flexibility in using APIs manufactured against a standard  other than GMP.

## Key questions for discussion
Do you have comments on the List of Atypical APIs for veterinary use?
The input that was gathered through this process will be used to update the List of Atypical Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients for Veterinary Use.
- Notice to Stakeholders – Implementation of Establishment Licensing Requirements for Atypical Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients for Veterinary Use
- Health Product Inspection & Licensing Health Product Compliance Directorate Health Canada 200 Eglantine Driveway Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9
- Email: hc.api.questions-ipa.sc@canada.ca
